ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-mono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: typescript
An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: typescript
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: labring/FastGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/labring/FastGPT
Language: typescript
FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: musistudio/claude-code-router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/musistudio/claude-code-router
Language: typescript
Use Claude Code as the foundation for coding infrastructure, allowing you to decide how to interact with the model while enjoying updates from Anthropic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
Language: typescript
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ourongxing/newsnow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ourongxing/newsnow
Language: typescript
Elegant reading of real-time and hottest news

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/claude-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siteboon/claudecodeui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siteboon/claudecodeui
Language: typescript
Use Claude Code, Cursor CLI or Codex on mobile and web with CloudCLI (aka Claude Code UI). CloudCLI is a free open source webui/GUI that helps you manage your Claude Code session and projects remotely

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tiann/hapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tiann/hapi
Language: typescript
App for Claude Code / Codex / Gemini / OpenCode, vibe coding anytime, anywhere

ns0:entry.ns0:title: virattt/dexter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/virattt/dexter
Language: typescript
An autonomous agent for deep financial research
